raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "src/components/ui/AdaptiveLayout.jsx", "issue": "Low UI mode fails to reduce visual complexity: charts remain detailed, secondary elements (e.g., tooltips, legends) not stripped. Violates Energy Adaptation Law 2.", "recommended_fix": "Simplify charts to static summaries in Low mode. Remove non-essential elements. Enforce via design system tokens."}, {"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "user profile settings", "issue": "UI mode toggle updates preference but does not trigger immediate re-render of active interface.", "recommended_fix": "Dispatch global event on preference save to force layout refresh across tabs."}, {"severity": "P2", "file_or_area": "MindShift stub", "issue": "In Low mode, visualization canvas fails to render due to missing adaptiveResolution fallback.", "recommended_fix": "Add default resolution path for missing flag. Implement graceful degradation."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Energy Adaptation Law 2 is violated in 4/5 products — systemic neglect of ADHD safety. Immediate risk to user retention.", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/components/ui/AdaptiveLayout.jsx", "apps/mindshift/src/config/loader.js"]}

findings.issue: Low UI mode fails to reduce visual complexity: charts remain detailed, secondary elements (e.g., tooltips, legends) not stripped. Violates Energy Adaptation Law 2.
findings.recommended_fix: Simplify charts to static summaries in Low mode. Remove non-essential elements. Enforce via design system tokens.

findings.issue: UI mode toggle updates preference but does not trigger immediate re-render of active interface.
findings.recommended_fix: Dispatch global event on preference save to force layout refresh across tabs.

findings.issue: In Low mode, visualization canvas fails to render due to missing adaptiveResolution fallback.
findings.recommended_fix: Add default resolution path for missing flag. Implement graceful degradation.

whistleblower_flag: Energy Adaptation Law 2 is violated in 4/5 products — systemic neglect of ADHD safety. Immediate risk to user retention.
